_comment: Maps levelID + chapterIndex to a sketch-style scene image, and levelID to a conclusion comic. All URLs are relative paths into the local /assets folder — place this assets.json alongside index.html, with an assets/ folder next to it containing these exact filenames. Nothing in script.js needs to change to use local files instead of remote placeholders.
